kernel/src/ipc.rs :: pub (crate) enum PipeWrite

kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const KERNEL_STACK_SIZE : usize = 8192 * 16
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const MAX_HEAP_SIZE : usize = 4 * 1024 * 1024
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PAGE_OFFSET_WIDTH : usize = 12
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PAGE_SIZE : usize = 4096
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PHYSICAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH : usize = 56
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PPN_WIDTH : usize = PHYSICAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH - PAGE_OFFSET_WIDTH
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const PTE_FLAGS_WIDTH : usize = 10
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const SIGNAL_TRAMPOLINE : usize = TRAP_CONTEXT - PAGE_SIZE
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const TRAMPOLINE : usize = usize :: MAX - PAGE_SIZE + 1
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const TRAP_CONTEXT : usize = TRAMPOLINE - PAGE_SIZE
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const USER_STACK_SIZE : usize = 8192 * 32
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const VIRTUAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH : usize = 39
kernel/src/memory/config.rs :: pub (crate) const VPN_WIDTH : usize = VIRTUAL_ADDRESS_WIDTH - PAGE_OFFSET_WIDTH

kernel/src/memory/mm.rs :: enum UserAccessError :: # [doc = " 地址为空、非用户 canonical 地址、未映射或权限不匹配。"] Fault
kernel/src/memory/mm.rs :: enum UserAccessError :: # [doc = " 地址加长度发生整数溢出。"] Overflow
kernel/src/memory/mm.rs :: enum UserAccessError :: # [doc = " 无法为 kernel-owned copy 缓冲区分配内存。"] OutOfMemory

kernel/src/socket.rs :: enum SocketError :: # [doc = " active connect 已启动，调用方应进入 writable/error wait。"] InProgress
kernel/src/socket.rs :: enum SocketError :: # [doc = " established stream 被 peer reset。"] ConnectionReset
kernel/src/socket.rs :: enum SocketError :: # [doc = " 同一 endpoint 已有尚未完成的 active connect。"] AlreadyInProgress

kernel/src/syscall/errno.rs :: pub (crate) const EACCES : isize = 13
kernel/src/syscall/errno.rs :: pub (crate) const EADDRINUSE : isize = 98
kernel/src/syscall/errno.rs :: pub (crate) const EADDRNOTAVAIL : isize = 99
kernel/src/syscall/errno.rs :: pub (crate) const EAFNOSUPPORT : isize = 97
kernel/src/syscall/errno.rs :: pub (crate) const EAGAIN : isize = 11

kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " ELF header、program header 或 script interpreter line 不满足契约。"] InvalidExecutable
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " VFS pathname 解析或 executable source 读取失败。"] FileSystem (FileSystemError)
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " script interpreter rewrite 超过 Linux 固定上限。"] InterpreterLoop
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " script rewrite 后 argv/envp 超过 exec argument byte limit。"] ArgumentListTooLong
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " 普通文件没有任何 execute mode bit。"] NotExecutable
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " 最终 inode 不是普通文件。"] NotRegularFile
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: enum ProgramLoadError :: # [doc = " 有界 probe、ELF metadata、argv rewrite 或 mapping plan 分配失败。"] OutOfMemory
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: pub (crate) const EXEC_ARGUMENT_BYTES_LIMIT : usize = 128 * 1024
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: pub (crate) enum ProgramLoadError
kernel/src/task/loader.rs :: pub (crate) fn load_executable (working_directory : Arc < dyn Inode > , path : Vec < u8 > , mut arguments : Vec < Vec < u8 > > , mut argument_bytes : usize , identity : & AccessIdentity ,) -> Result < LoadedExecutable , ProgramLoadError >

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Blocked
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Blocking { cpu : usize , }
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Exited
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: New
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Preempting { cpu : usize , }
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Ready { cpu : usize , generation : u64 , }
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Running { cpu : usize , }

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum RunState :: Stopped { resume : StopResume , }

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum StopResume :: Blocked
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum StopResume :: Runnable
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum StopTransition :: Blocking
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum StopTransition :: Preempting
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum StopTransition :: Running
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum StopTransition :: WakePending
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitMembership :: Child
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitMembership :: Console (u64)

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitMembership :: Futex (u64)

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitMembership :: Poll (u64)
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitMembership :: Signal (u64)
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitMembership :: Vfork (usize)
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitResult :: Interrupted
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitResult :: TimedOut
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: enum WaitResult :: Woken

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: pub (crate) Sched :: total_runtime_us : u64
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: pub (crate) Sched :: vruntime : u64

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: pub (crate) SchedulingState :: wait_result : Option < WaitResult >

kernel/src/task/model.rs :: pub (crate) enum RunState
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: pub (crate) enum StopResume
kernel/src/task/model.rs :: pub (crate) enum StopTransition

kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum FutexWaitError :: Fault
kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum FutexWaitError :: Interrupted
kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum FutexWaitError :: Invalid
kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum FutexWaitError :: TimedOut
kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum SignalWaitError :: Again
kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum SignalWaitError :: Interrupted

kernel/src/task/task_manager.rs :: enum ThreadCloneError :: Memory (crate :: memory :: MemoryError)
